name: Gelida Jidka Hawada Nasopharyngeal (NPA)
description: Gelida marin-haweedka sanka oo dabacsan si ay u ilaaliso dareenka marin-haweedka bukaanka miyir-beelka ah ama miyir-beelka.
steps: Dooro cabbirka NPA ee habboon (cabir sanka ilaa xuubka dhegta).
Si deeqsinimo leh ugu subag NPA saliid ama milix biyo-milmi leh.
Geli biinka badbaadada dhexda garabka haddii aanu hore u jirin (waxay ka hortagtaa hamiga).
Geli si tartiib ah daloolada midig ee sanka (gow u jeedda septum), adigoo u sii socda si la mid ah saxanka.
Hore u soco ilaa baalku ka soo hor jeedo sanka.
Dib u dhig bukaanka (booska soo kabashada haddii aysan jirin walaac laf dhabarta) oo dib u qiimee marin-haweedka.
Haddii iska caabin la kulmo, tijaabi sanka bidix ee sanka.
warnings: Kahortag laga shakisan yahay jabka madaxa basil (indhaha raccoon, calaamada dagaalka, wiyisha CSF).
NPA waa bukaanka miyir daboolan ee isku xira marin hawoeedka bilowga ah ee ugu wanaagsan -- OPA waxay kicin kartaa matag bukaanada miyir daboolan.
